citation_and_locator: Xu, Yifa. 2020. On the Temporal Structure of the ‘Not.yet’ Negator Mei6 in Cantonese. Peer-reviewed conference paper; HKUST research portal metadata and Linguistic Society of Hong Kong ARF 2020 abstract book pp. 62-63
what_it_supports: Directly identifies `mei6` as specialized not-yet negation; contrasts it with `mou5` and `m4`; reports situation-type, aspect, temporal-adverbial, habitual, frequency, and past-reference restrictions; proposes reference-time semantics for events/states.
limit: The full paper and complete judgment paradigm were not available; the abstract's formal proposal and examples support research typing, not executable universal accept/reject rules.

citation_and_locator: 鄭定歐、張勵妍、高石英. 2021. 粵語（香港話）教程（修訂版）; printed p. 192 / checked user PDF p. 214
what_it_supports: Exact preverbal `我未去過美國`, `我未見過王小姐`, and `今日嘅報紙我仲未睇完` distinguish not-yet experiential and not-yet completion profiles.
limit: Pedagogical examples do not establish unrestricted lexical productivity, full state/event selection, or the complete contrast with every negator.

citation_and_locator: Lam, Cherry Chit-Yu. 2018. On the Interaction between Negation and Aspect in Grammaticalisation: A Cross-linguistic Study of Three Chinese Varieties. Current Research in Chinese Linguistics 97(1):215-232; pp. 215-218 and 227-230
what_it_supports: Establishes split Hong Kong Cantonese negation: ordinary `m4` differs from existential/possessive and aspect-sensitive event/perfective `mou5`.
limit: Does not itself supply the complete distribution of preverbal `mei6` or every experiential/completion subtype.

citation_and_locator: Matthews and Yip. 2011. Cantonese: A Comprehensive Grammar, multimedia supplement; section 11.2.5, `食過醉雞未呀`
what_it_supports: Exact postpredicate `V過…未` experiential question, establishing a word-order and clause-type boundary from preverbal `未V過` statements.
limit: One reference example does not establish every final-`未` predicate or question subtype.
